overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic urban commercial district. The clip follows a small child character walking past the 'Eden Plaza' building, through palm-lined streets, past a large arena structure, and finally entering the neon-lit plaza entrance. The scene features bright midday sunlight, vivid neon signage, and futuristic vehicles.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic commercial street with Eden Plaza

events.description: futuristic red sports car drives past on the multi-lane street

agents.ego_description: following a small child character in a red and white outfit walking along the sidewalk

notable_agents.action: red sports car driving along the street from left to right
man in tactical gear walking toward the camera

entered.detail: large commercial building with green neon trim and 'Eden Plaza' signage
massive digital billboard displaying an astronaut image with 'HIROSHI' text
tall black pole with glowing cyan light panels
tall palm trees lining the street
tall reflective glass building in the background

segments.scene_description: Walking along a futuristic commercial street with the Eden Plaza building visible on the left. The scene is bright and sunny with clear skies. Pedestrians walk in various directions and a red sports car drives past on the multi-lane road. Massive digital billboards and palm trees line the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: plaza approaching large arena building with sloped roof

events.description: turning left toward the large arena building, leaving the main commercial street

agents.ego_description: continuing to follow the child character toward the distinctive sloped-roof building

notable_agents.action: child in red and white jacket walking ahead toward the arena

entered.detail: massive building with distinctive white sloped roof and tiered structure
modern black bus shelter with glass panels and bench seating

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up into a wide plaza as the camera turns left toward a massive arena building with a distinctive sloped white roof. The Eden Plaza building disappears from view behind. A modern bus stop shelter appears on the left, and palm trees line the walkway. The child character continues walking ahead toward the arena entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: palm tree lined pedestrian walkway with bus stops

agents.ego_description: walking along the shaded pedestrian path lined with palm trees

notable_agents.action: people sitting on benches at the bus stop waiting

entered.detail: wide tiled walkway with striped patterns

segments.scene_description: Walking along a pedestrian path shaded by palm trees. The arena building is now behind, and the path features modern bus stops with people sitting on benches. Digital signage appears on the right side of the path. The vegetation is denser here with regularly spaced palm trees creating a corridor effect.

events.description: crossing the street at the intersection, turning right
returning to the commercial strip with Eden Plaza building visible again

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection and turning right back toward the Eden Plaza area

notable_agents.action: woman in business suit crossing the street in the same direction

entered.detail: wide crosswalk with yellow and white striped lines
large digital screens displaying food advertisements

segments.scene_description: Crossing a wide urban intersection with clearly marked crosswalks. The Eden Plaza building comes back into view on the left as the camera turns right. Commercial billboards displaying food items appear on the right. Pedestrians cross in various directions and sparse traffic moves through the intersection.

scene_state.functional_zone: Eden Plaza entrance with glowing floor tiles and covered roof

events.description: entering the covered plaza area with blue neon ceiling lighting and glowing floor tiles
approaching the Eden Plaza entrance doors under the covered canopy

agents.ego_description: walking into the Eden Plaza entrance area under the covered roof with neon lighting

entered.detail: main entrance with large illuminated 'EDEN PLAZA' signage above doors
blue and cyan illuminated floor panels lighting up the walkway
overhanging glass and metal canopy with blue neon lighting
vertical text billboard reading '2nd AMENDMENT IS NOT ONLY FOR THE RICH'

segments.scene_description: Entering the Eden Plaza entrance area which is covered by a large canopy with blue neon lighting. The floor features glowing cyan tiles that illuminate as the character approaches. The 'EDEN PLAZA' signage is prominently displayed above the entrance. The lighting shifts from bright natural sunlight to a mixed neon and natural light environment.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a sun-drenched futuristic commercial district that gradually transitions into a neon-lit plaza entrance. It begins on a bright, sunny street lined with palm trees and massive digital billboards, moving past the Eden Plaza building as a red sports car drives by. As the camera turns left, the scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by a massive arena with a sloped white roof, before shifting into a shaded pedestrian corridor of dense palm trees and modern bus stops. The view then expands across a wide urban intersection with food billboards and crossing pedestrians before turning right to bring the Eden Plaza building back into focus. Finally, the camera moves under a large canopy where the bright natural sunlight gives way to a mixed environment of blue neon lighting and glowing cyan floor tiles at the entrance of Eden Plaza.
